title: Pack of 3 Assorted Wiggly Eyes Art and Craft
features: Reusable pouch of Wiggly Eyes, in 3 assorted sizes

Great for home or the classroom
description: These wiggly eyes are great for children's arts & crafts. They can be used for modelling, scrapbooking and other crafting projects. Including 3 sizes small, medium and large.
